chunks.text: HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Misc: Application No.S-208 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on M.A No.3182/2026 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection (s) 3. For orders on M.A No.3183/2026 (Exemption) 4. For hearing of main case 27.04.2026 None present on behalf of the applicant-Hamid. No intimation is received. Through this Crl. Misc: application, the applicant prayed for production of his children Muhammad Ibrahim (08 years old), Muhammad Younis (04 years old) and Baby Aizal (02 years old). It appears from the Order dated 01.04.2026, passed by learned Additional Sessions Judge-V, Hyderabad in Crl. M.A No.112/2026 that respondent No.5-Mst.Rimsha Bibi, the mother of detainees had appeared before V-Additional Sessions Judge, Shaheed Benazirabad and submitted that she was happily residing with her parents along with her children after her former husband, the applicant-Hamid had divorced her. The Additional Sessions court also recorded that she had contracted second marriage and was residing with one Zaffar Lashari. The applicant has now come before this High Court aggrieved by the impugned order dated 01.04.2026, claiming his children were apparently not produced before the Court of the Additional Sessions Judge. It is not the business of this High Court to substitute itself in custody matters, which fall squarely within the domain of the Guardian & Ward Court. This lis is one such case. The applicant is at liberty to move proper application before the competent Court. No relief is made out in the present facts and circumstances. Given the above, this Crl. Misc: application is dismissed in limine along with listed applications.
Given the above, this Crl. Misc: application is dismissed in limine along with listed applications. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
